user.title: Connect to Decent Espresso
user.description: Enter the IP address or hostname of the tablet or computer running the ReaPrime/Decent Espresso app.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to Decent Espresso. Confirm the app is running and port 8080 is reachable from Home Assistant.
error.invalid_response: Decent Espresso responded, but not with the expected API response.

abort.already_configured: This Decent Espresso app is already configured
